title: Linear multiplication count of Horner's rule
statement_informal: Evaluating a polynomial with k coefficients by Horner's rule uses exactly k-1 multiplications.

cost_model.notes: Each Horner step c + x*v is one multiplication; the innermost coefficient costs none, so total = length - 1.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 2, evaluation of polynomials (fact only).
